role: Central directory for ArchSpine project configuration standards, including layered architecture constraints and naming conventions.
responsibility: Defines and enforces architectural boundaries, import rules, and naming conventions (interface prefixes, test file suffixes) to ensure code consistency and maintain clean separation of concerns across the monorepo.

children.role: Architecture constraint documentation for the ArchSpine mirror system layered architecture.
Define and document project-specific naming conventions for code consistency in a monorepo environment.
